holdings.infoBox: NITE is an equity ETF with a total of 21 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tesla stock at 13.13%, NVIDIA at 8.90%, Amazon.com at 7.92%, MGM Resorts International at 4.82%, and The Charles Schwab Corporation at 4.57%.

overview.description: The Nightview Fund NITE (NITE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively manages a narrow portfolio of US equity securities. The fund aims for long-term capital appreciation while attempting to beat the S&P 500 over five years. NITE was launched on Jun 21, 2024 and is issued by The Nightview.
